Name: base-rules
Description: Ruleset QC nền cho document health, naming, standards, duplicates, và sheet hygiene cơ bản.

Rules.Title: Document should have a saved path
Rules.SuggestedAction: Save the model to establish a stable document path.

Rules.Title: Model warnings should stay under threshold
Rules.SuggestedAction: Review warnings and resolve high-frequency warning types first.

Rules.Title: Linked models should be loaded
Rules.SuggestedAction: Load missing links or confirm they are intentionally unloaded.

Rules.Title: Selection should not sit on non-editable worksets
Rules.SuggestedAction: Borrow/open the relevant worksets before mutation workflows.

Rules.Title: View names should follow naming hygiene
Rules.SuggestedAction: Rename copied or malformed views before issuing sheets.

Rules.Title: Model should avoid duplicate elements
Rules.SuggestedAction: Inspect duplicate groups and remove redundant instances.

Rules.Title: Model standards checks should pass
Rules.SuggestedAction: Review the failing standards checks and address the most impactful ones first.

Rules.Title: Sheets should contain title blocks
Rules.SuggestedAction: Place a valid title block on every issued sheet.

Rules.Title: Sheets should not be empty
Rules.SuggestedAction: Place views or schedules before sheet issue review.

Rules.Title: Required sheet parameters should be filled
Rules.SuggestedAction: Fill missing sheet metadata before issue/export.
